Read existing iteration records for a specific step and run

read_iteration_records_for_step.Rd

Returns detail records (`iteration_result` and `sample_result`) ordered by `(iteration_id, sample_id)`. Used by `run.workflowstep()` to reconstruct skipped-iteration outputs when resuming a partially completed looped step.

Usage

read_iteration_records_for_step(
  run_id,
  step,
  path_to_folder,
  results_file = "results_summary.json"
)

Arguments

run_id

Character. The run identifier.

step

Integer. The step index.

path_to_folder

Path to the workflow folder.

results_file

Name of the results JSON file (default: `"results_summary.json"`).

Value

A list of matching records, each a named list, ordered by `iteration_id`.
